description: Install Flutter SDK and the flutterrific_opentelemetry package, then verify the project builds and existing tests pass with the new dependency.
steps: Install Flutter SDK in the sandbox by cloning the Flutter stable branch to /opt/flutter and adding it to PATH. Run 'flutter doctor' to confirm installation. Note: the project requires Dart SDK ^3.11.1.
Add 'flutterrific_opentelemetry: ^0.3.4' to the dependencies section of pubspec.yaml (after the existing share_plus entry).
Run 'flutter pub get' in /projects/sandbox/kiro-mobile to resolve the new dependency and its transitive deps (dartastic_opentelemetry, dartastic_opentelemetry_api, go_router, etc.).
Run 'flutter analyze' to verify no static analysis issues are introduced by the new dependency.
Run 'flutter test' to confirm all existing tests still pass.
acceptance_criteria: Flutter SDK is installed and operational in the sandbox
flutter pub get completes successfully with no version conflicts
flutter test passes all existing tests
verification: Run 'flutter --version' to confirm Flutter SDK is installed
